summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AutoDamageIQ SAM integration (Feature 6) and Before/After comparison (Feature 7). All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified Compare page and SAM data display in ResultPage work correctly.

issues: data-testid='compare-title' not found - title element exists but missing testid attribute

action_items: Minor: Add data-testid='compare-title' to ComparePage h1 element for better test automation
seed_data_creation: Test analyses and comparisons created during testing using /app/assets/crash_*.jpg images
context_for_next_testing_agent: SAM and Before/After features are fully functional. SAM model loads on first analyze call (~30s on CPU). SAM data includes mask_score, measurements (area_pixels, area_cm2, area_percentage, size_band). Before/After comparison returns verdict, verdict_confidence, new_damages, alignment info, and difference stats. All previous 5 features (quality, repair, review queue, severity, anomaly) still work correctly.

sam_status_endpoint.returns: library_installed, checkpoint_exists, checkpoint_path, checkpoint_size_mb, model_type, model_loaded, device

sam_in_analyze.returns: available, mask_score, measurements (area_pixels, area_cm2, area_percentage, size_band)

compare_upload.returns: has_new_damage, verdict, verdict_confidence, new_damages, alignment, difference, before_analysis, after_analysis

compare_by_id.returns: id, before_id, after_id, has_new_damage, verdict, verdict_confidence, new_damages, alignment, difference, summary

comparisons_list.returns: List of comparisons with id, before_id, after_id, created_at, has_new_damage, verdict, new_damage_count

existing_features_regression.note: All previous features (quality, anomaly, repair, severity, review) still work correctly

ui_features_verified.header_compare_nav: PASS - 'Karsilastir' navigation button present in header
ui_features_verified.compare_upload_mode: PASS - File upload inputs for before/after images present
ui_features_verified.compare_select_mode: PASS - 'Mevcut Analizden Sec' mode shows analysis dropdowns
ui_features_verified.compare_button: PASS - Karsilastir button present and functional
ui_features_verified.result_page_sam_data: PASS - SAM measurements (Alan: %) displayed in damage cards
ui_features_verified.result_page_anomaly: PASS - Anomaly score and signals displayed

compare_feature_info.timeout_recommendation: 180 seconds for compare operations due to dual YOLO inference
